text: Tesla IPO market cap was 0.1% of its current value https://t.co/UhlqbkauzX
summary: Tesla IPO market cap was 0.1% of its current value
ai_summary: Elon Musk highlights Tesla's extraordinary valuation growth since its 2010 IPO, noting the company is now worth 1,000x its initial public market capitalization. This demonstrates the massive value creation achieved through scaling electric vehicle production, advancing battery technology, and establishing market dominance in EVs—a key business lesson on long-term execution and market opportunity validation for entrepreneurs building hardware/manufacturing businesses.
